chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-972 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 4079/23 3.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 4080/23 4.For hearing of main case 27-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. ***** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received so far. This petition was filed in the year 2023 and thereafter no serious efforts were made to have the matter fixed in Court for issuance of notices to other side, which shows that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in proceeding with this matter or the purpose, for which instant petition was filed, has been achieved. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
